item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response wakes up to the repeated manual-verification pattern, explicitly names the prior three gates plus the fourth request, rejects making the new entrance verifier a standing default, and moves upstream to system/template/data-generation causes with automation and validation fixes. It permits only a tightly scoped one-day emergency check, which does not trigger the fail signal because the standing solution is subtraction/structural repair rather than another permanent manual gate."}
